metadata.title: Quick Mid Play Turns Into a Clean Double Kill in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Sliding through mid with steady aim to catch both opponents off guard. Watch how timing and positioning deliver a swift 2v1 win.
Where do you like to push for quick picks?

#shorts #valorant #gaming

What’s your favorite spot to pull off a quick double kill? Share below!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #fps #valorantclips
